title: Additional issues with interfaces inside of generate blocks

features.name: interface declaration with signal member
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration containing at least one logic signal member that can be referenced via dotted access

features.name: interface instantiation inside named generate block
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiated with empty parentheses inside a named generate block (begin : block_name)
features.snippet:
generate
    if (1) begin : my_gen
        my_intf my_intf();
    end
endgenerate

features.name: dotted access to interface signal inside named generate block
features.description: Code should include dotted access to an interface signal where the interface instance resides inside a named generate block

features.name: interface passed as module port from named generate block
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that receives an interface as a port connection where the interface instance is declared inside a named generate block
